summary: Improved Lead Console operator UX for queue clarity, delegation explainability, approval inbox flow, and heartbeat/progress visibility.
why: Lead control-plane functions existed but operator visibility and decision ergonomics were limited.
The update improves explainability and reduces approval/triage friction without changing cost telemetry or OpenClaw connector internals.
risks: Heartbeat freshness depends on workers emitting task activities consistently.
Queue-state UI mapping depends on current lead status enum semantics.
